flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Connors State College fell 39% between 2006 and 2009 (32.8% → 20.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Connors State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.7k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Connors State College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (2.1k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Connors State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
